session.assistant:
## make fast-ci Report
The build failed with multiple issues to report:
### Prettier Formatting Issues (3 files)
Code style issues found in 3 markdown files: - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/plan-row-data.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
### Python Formatting Issues (1 file)
- `src/erk/core/health_checks/__init__.py` would be reformatted
### Linting Issues (1 error)
File: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/fakes/gateway/github.py:21` - **Error**: `F401` - `erk_shared.gateway.github.types.FetchedPullRequest` imported but unused - **Status**: 1 error found, 1 fixable with `--fix` option
### Test Results
All tests passed successfully: - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5901 passed in 14.53s - **Tests (erk-dev)**: 138 passed in 5.78s - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: 124 passed in 0.89s
### Type Checking
- **ty**: All checks passed
### Other Checks
- **Markdown Check**: OK - **Exec Reference Check**: OK (`.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is up to date) - **AGENTS.md standard**: PASSED - **CLAUDE.md files**: All properly paired (19 checked, 0 violations)
### Summary
**Exit code: 1** - Fast CI failed due to: 1. Unused import in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/fakes/gateway/github.py` 2. Code formatting issues in 4 files (3 markdown, 1 Python)
